creator: gonzo@FreeBSD.org
text:
Just to add some more information:

If I understand correctly the link in question is https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/buglist.cgi?component=Individual%20Port%28s%29&list_id=201133&product=Ports%20%26%20Packages&resolution=---

And you have to be logged out to trigger the error.
